assignCategories.description: A list of categories to be assigned to a message.

copyToFolder.description: The ID of a folder that a message is to be copied to.

delete.description: Indicates whether a message should be moved to the Deleted Items folder.

forwardAsAttachmentTo.description: The email addresses of the recipients to which a message should be forwarded as an attachment.

forwardTo.description: The email addresses of the recipients to which a message should be forwarded.

markAsRead.description: Indicates whether a message should be marked as read.

markImportance.description: Sets the importance of the message, which can be: low, normal, high.

moveToFolder.description: The ID of the folder that a message will be moved to.

permanentDelete.description: Indicates whether a message should be permanently deleted and not saved to the Deleted Items folder.

redirectTo.description: The email addresses to which a message should be redirected.

stopProcessingRules.description: Indicates whether subsequent rules should be evaluated.
